title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: obra/superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，强调其有效性。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: ECC 是一个针对 Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor 等 AI 编码代理的性能优化系统，专注于技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development.
For Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随用户共同成长的智能代理项目，旨在提供持续进化的交互体验。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，提供400多种集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform
native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由智能体管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言和Gajae-Code/LazyCodex构建，完全无需人工干预进行开发和维护。
highlights: An agent-managed museum exhibit
built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
content: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
summary: 该项目提供了一个基于Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱观察的CLAUDE.md文件，旨在改善Claude Code的行为表现。
highlights: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior
derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 是一个旨在让 AI 对所有人可访问、可使用和可构建的开源项目，其使命是提供工具，让用户专注于重要的事情。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
to use and to build on
Our mission is to provide the tools
so that you can focus on what matters

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种 AI 模型，包括 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.1、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: Are we offloading too much of our thinking to AI?
content: Article URL: https://www.artfish.ai/p/offloading-thinking-to-ai Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48908178 Points: 515 # Comments: 474
summary: 探讨过度依赖AI进行思考的风险，分析人类认知能力可能因此退化，并呼吁平衡使用AI工具以保持独立思考。
highlights: 过度依赖AI可能导致批判性思维和问题解决能力的下降
AI应作为辅助工具而非替代人类思考
需要建立健康的人机协作模式以维护认知自主性

title: AI Data Centers and the Concentration of Wealth
summary: 文章探讨了AI数据中心如何加剧财富集中，指出少数科技巨头通过控制AI基础设施进一步扩大经济不平等。
highlights: AI data centers are becoming a new form of concentrated wealth.
The control of AI infrastructure by a few companies exacerbates economic inequality.

title: Inventing ELIZA - How the First Chatbot Shaped the Future of AI
content: <p>The book "Inventing ELIZA - How the First Chatbot Shaped the Future of AI". It is Open Access so the link to the PDF is <a href="https://direct.mit.edu/books/book-pdf/2615293/book_9780262052504.pdf" rel="ugc">here</a></p> <p>The book has a companion <a href="findingeliza.org" rel="ugc">site</a> - I was monitoring this since I first heard the <a href="https://corecursive.com/eliza-with-jeff-shrager/" rel="ugc">episode</a> on CoRecursive.</p> <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/hquwey/inventing_eliza_how_first_chatbot_shaped">Comments</a></p>
summary: 《Inventing ELIZA》一书探讨了首个聊天机器人ELIZA的发明及其对人工智能发展的影响，提供开放获取PDF及配套网站资源。
highlights: The book 'Inventing ELIZA - How the First Chatbot Shaped the Future of AI' is Open Access.
Companion site: findingeliza.org
Related CoRecursive podcast episode on ELIZA with Jeff Shrager.

title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
content: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.
summary: OpenAI提出了一种“反向联邦制”的AI治理方法，通过州法律推动建立国家层面的安全、民主AI框架。
highlights: OpenAI outlines a 'reverse federalism' approach to AI governance
state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI

title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
content: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.
summary: GPT-Red是OpenAI开发的自动化红队系统，通过自我对弈提升AI安全性、对齐性和提示注入鲁棒性。
highlights: GPT-Red通过自我对弈自动生成对抗性攻击
显著提升模型对提示注入的防御能力
无需人工干预即可持续改进AI对齐性

title: What building Shippy taught us about building agents
summary: 本文介绍了Shippy项目在构建AI代理过程中的经验教训，强调了模块化设计、迭代开发、用户反馈循环以及错误处理的重要性，并分享了如何通过实际应用场景优化代理性能。
highlights: 模块化设计是构建可靠代理的基础，允许独立测试和替换组件。
早期用户反馈循环显著加速了代理的改进过程。
错误处理机制需要从实际部署中不断学习并优化。
迭代开发比一次性完美设计更有效，尤其是在复杂代理系统中。

title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn’t.
summary: 本文探讨了模型路由的复杂性，指出虽然概念简单，但在实际应用中面临诸多挑战，如模型选择、性能权衡和动态调整等。
highlights: Model routing is simple. Until it isn’t.
The complexity arises from balancing accuracy, latency, and cost across diverse models.
Dynamic routing strategies are essential for real-world deployment.
